title: Conversation fillers that buy time
subtitle: Sound natural while thinking.
overview: Short fillers give your brain time.

items.es: Bueno, creo que depende de la situación.
items.en: Well, I think it depends on the situation.

items.es: A ver, primero necesitamos revisar la fecha.
items.en: Let’s see, first we need to check the date.
Well, I am not completely sure.

items.es: La verdad es que prefiero otra opción.
items.en: The truth is that I prefer another option.
Hmm, let me think about it for a moment.
